org.exist.storage.serializers
Class XIncludeFilter

java.lang.Object
  org.exist.storage.serializers.XIncludeFilter
All Implemented Interfaces:
Receiver
public class XIncludeFilter
extends java.lang.Object
implements Receiver

A filter that listens for XInclude elements in the stream of events generated by the Serializer. XInclude elements are expanded at the position where they were found.
